content:
🔥 caligula | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Creating, burning, and verifying disk images from a user-friendly terminal interface.
✨ Key Features: • Disk imaging and burning • TUI interface • Disk listing with size and model info • Compression support (gz, bz2, xz, lz4, zst) • Hash validation (md5, sha1, sha256, etc.)
📖 Summary: Caligula is a lightweight, user-friendly TUI application for creating and verifying disk images. It offers features like disk listing, compression handling, hash validation, and post-write verification, all within a terminal interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
